themes.title: Checkout Reliability
themes.description: Enhancing the reliability and performance of the checkout process.

themes.title: User Experience Improvement
themes.description: Improving the overall user experience during the checkout process.

themes.title: Payment Gateway Migration
themes.description: Migrating to a new payment gateway to enhance payment processing.

milestones.name: MVP Completion
milestones.description: Complete the MVP features for the checkout redesign.
milestones.success_criteria: All MVP features are implemented and tested, with a reduction in checkout API latency by 30%.

milestones.name: V1 Completion
milestones.description: Complete the V1 features including migration to the new payment gateway.
milestones.success_criteria: Successful migration to the new payment gateway with a 20% increase in transaction success rate.

milestones.name: V2 Completion
milestones.description: Complete the V2 features focusing on user feedback and analytics.
milestones.success_criteria: User feedback collected shows a 25% improvement in checkout satisfaction scores.

sequencing.reason: V1 features depend on the successful completion of MVP features.
V2 features rely on the successful implementation of V1 features.

mvp.goal: Establish a reliable and efficient checkout process with essential features.

v1.goal: Enhance payment processing capabilities and monitor performance.

v2.goal: Improve user experience through feedback and analytics.
